title: UX brainstorm for v0.0.1 (Tasks 9-16)
description: Run the gating UX brainstorm before Tasks 9-16 implementation. Anchor on docs/design/v0.0.1-ux-principles.md. Produce committed mockups + interaction patterns + dashboard layout doc at docs/design/v0.0.1-ux-mockups.md. Covers: wizard (Tasks 9-11), inbox tabbed view (12), reading pane (13), compose window (14), session log pane (15), status bar dashboard (16). Hard review gate per Cameron's framing (2026-05-05 kestrel handoff + reaffirmed 2026-05-17 plover-pine-finch session). Uses superpowers:brainstorming with visual companion default-on; terminal output is docs/superpowers/specs/<date>-tuxlink-v0.0.1-ux-design.md and then writing-plans hand-off.
notes: 2026-05-17 salamander-vetch-heron continuation. Canonical design doc drafted from static-artifact mining (WINE walkthrough abandoned; see project_pi5_wine_16k_block.md). PR #33 open: https://github.com/cameronzucker/tuxlink/pull/33 — closes-via-deliverable when merged. 10 amendment PRs (AMD-1..AMD-10) queued in §9 of the design doc; not yet opened. Worktree at worktrees/bd-tuxlink-x5p-ux-brainstorm/ stays preserved through the AMD PRs since they may need to cross-reference Express artifacts; disposable after AMD-10 lands.
close_reason: PR #33 merged 2026-05-17: canonical UX design doc landed at docs/design/v0.0.1-ux-mockups.md (529 lines, synthesizes brainstorm + Express artifact static audit). Hard review gate for Tasks 9-16 satisfied. 10 amendment PRs (AMD-1..AMD-10) queued in §9 — those will be done as follow-on work and don't gate on x5p staying open.

title: Task 18: README + install docs
description: See docs/plans/2026-04-22-tuxlink-v0.0.1-plan.md (Task 18). User-facing README and docs/install.md (WebKitGTK 4.1 dep).

title: Task 19: GitHub Actions CI + release
description: See docs/plans/2026-04-22-tuxlink-v0.0.1-plan.md (Task 19). FINAL REVIEW GATE. CI workflow (clippy, cargo test, vitest), release workflow (tagged AppImage build), pristine-output assertion.

title: Task 17: AppImage packaging
description: See docs/plans/2026-04-22-tuxlink-v0.0.1-plan.md (Task 17). Bundle Pat v1.0.0 binary, AppImage build, SHA256.

title: Task 16: Status bar
description: See docs/plans/2026-04-22-tuxlink-v0.0.1-plan.md (Task 16). REVIEW GATE. Bottom status bar (stubbed in v0.0.1; real session-state in v0.1).

title: Task 15: Session log pane
description: See docs/plans/2026-04-22-tuxlink-v0.0.1-plan.md (Task 15). SessionLog component showing recent telnet session events.

title: Task 14: Compose window
description: See docs/plans/2026-04-22-tuxlink-v0.0.1-plan.md (Task 14). Compose new message, draft persistence on hide/close per docs/ux-anti-patterns.md.

title: Task 13: Message reading pane
description: See docs/plans/2026-04-22-tuxlink-v0.0.1-plan.md (Task 13). MessageView component for opening individual messages.

title: Task 12: Inbox/Sent tabbed view
description: See docs/plans/2026-04-22-tuxlink-v0.0.1-plan.md (Task 12). Mailbox tab UI with Inbox/Sent/Posted, react-virtuoso virtualization.

title: Task 10: Wizard screen 2 — credentials
description: See docs/plans/2026-04-22-tuxlink-v0.0.1-plan.md (Task 10). Wizard step 2: callsign, Winlink CMS password (NEVER stored in tuxlink config), grid square.

title: Task 11: Wizard screen 3 — test send
description: See docs/plans/2026-04-22-tuxlink-v0.0.1-plan.md (Task 11). REVIEW GATE. Wizard step 3: test send to SERVICE@winlink.org, await autoresponder reply.

title: Task 9: Wizard screen 1 — Winlink account
description: See docs/plans/2026-04-22-tuxlink-v0.0.1-plan.md (Task 9). First-run wizard step 1: account check, link to winlink.org/user.

title: Task 8: System tray + window-close behavior
description: See docs/plans/2026-04-22-tuxlink-v0.0.1-plan.md (Task 8). Tray icon, click-to-show, close-hides-to-tray. Only File→Quit / tray→Quit / Ctrl+Q exit.

title: Task 7: Native OS menu bar
description: See docs/plans/2026-04-22-tuxlink-v0.0.1-plan.md (Task 7). File / Message / Session / Mailbox / View / Tools / Help menus per docs/ux-anti-patterns.md.

title: Task 6: Live-CMS smoke binary (operator-only)
description: See docs/plans/2026-04-22-tuxlink-v0.0.1-plan.md (Task 6). REVIEW GATE. Operator-only live-CMS smoke binary in src-tauri/src/bin/live_cms_smoke.rs. RADIO-1: subagents MUST NOT run this.

title: Task 5: Pat HTTP client
description: See docs/plans/2026-04-22-tuxlink-v0.0.1-plan.md (Task 5). Blocking reqwest client wrapping Pat's HTTP API.

title: Task 2: Config schema and serializer
description: See docs/plans/2026-04-22-tuxlink-v0.0.1-plan.md (Task 2). Config struct with schema_version validation, XDG path resolution. TDD per Mandatory Per-Task Preamble.

title: Task 3: Pat child-process lifecycle
description: See docs/plans/2026-04-22-tuxlink-v0.0.1-plan.md (Task 3). Spawn Pat as managed child, SIGTERM on quit, PID file at $XDG_RUNTIME_DIR/tuxlink-pat.pid.

title: Task 1: Tauri 2 + React + TypeScript scaffold
description: See docs/plans/2026-04-22-tuxlink-v0.0.1-plan.md (Task 1). Tauri 2.x project, React 18 + TypeScript 5, Vite. Verify pnpm tauri dev and pnpm tauri build.

value: Path C accepted 2026-05-17: skip WINE-Express walkthrough; do static-artifact mining instead under bd-tuxlink-x5p. Cameron rated the walkthrough's marginal value below the cost of either rebooting Pi onto 4k-page kernel or pivoting to Windows. Static analysis of CHM + Cameron's installed RMS Express dir + the official installer is the substitute. Findings land in docs/design/v0.0.1-ux-mockups.md.

PR #33 (bd-tuxlink-x5p/canonical-design-doc) opens 2026-05-17 with 529-line canonical UX design doc at docs/design/v0.0.1-ux-mockups.md. Synthesizes brainstorm + Express artifact static audit. Queues AMD-1..AMD-10 follow-up PRs in §9. Closes tuxlink-x5p via deliverable when merged.
